What You Will Learn

Excel skills you can use immediately at work.

Every lesson is designed around office tasks: cleaning data, preparing reports, tracking records, and presenting results clearly.

Function Samples

Famous Excel formulas included in the training.

These are the common formulas used for reports, student records, sales summaries, inventory, payroll, and office monitoring sheets.

SUMIFS=SUMIFS(Sales, Region, "Cebu", Month, "June")
COUNTIFS=COUNTIFS(Status,"Done",Dept,"Admin")
XLOOKUP=XLOOKUP(E2,ID,Full_Name,"Not Found")
VLOOKUP=VLOOKUP(A2,Table,3,FALSE)
HLOOKUP=HLOOKUP(B1,Data,4,FALSE)
INDEX MATCH=INDEX(Name,MATCH(A2,ID,0))
IF + AND=IF(AND(C2>=75,D2="Yes"),"Pass","Check")
TEXTJOIN=TEXTJOIN(" ",TRUE,First,Last)
FILTER=FILTER(Table,Table[Status]="Pending")
UNIQUE=UNIQUE(Table[Department])
PROPER/TRIM=PROPER(TRIM(A2))
IFERROR=IFERROR(A2/B2,0)

FAQ

Common questions.

Is this for beginners?

Yes. The lessons start with basic Excel skills and move toward advanced workplace outputs.

Will Power Query be included?

Yes. You will learn cleaning, transforming, merging, appending, and refreshing data.

Will dashboards be included?

Yes. You will learn KPI cards, pivot charts, slicers, timelines, and dynamic report layouts.

What is the tagline?

From raw data to confident decisions.
